rulings.Case Title: JUAN ZEPEDA MAGANA VS. GOLDEN STATE MOTOR GROUP INC et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn For Award Of Attorneys' Fees Costs & Expenses; Req. Of Judicial Ntc And Appendix Of Non-California Authorities
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Wednesday, January 26, 2011, line 1, PLAINTIFF JUAN MAGANA'S Motion For Award Of Attorneys' Fees Costs & Expenses. MOTION FOR AWARD OF ATTORNEY'S FEES AND COSTS IS GRANTED IN THE AMOUNT OF $73,682.25. BREAKDOWN IS AS FOLLOWS: PARTNER 70 HOURS @ $400 = $28,000 ASSOCIATE AND LAW CLERKS 100 HOURS @ $250 = $25,000 SUPPORT 30 HOURS @ $225 = $6,750 SUBTOTAL = $59,750 MULTIPLIER .2 = $11,950 = $71,700.00 COSTS $1,982.25 = $73,682.25 =(302/LMG)

rulings.Case Title: YEONG JOO KIM VS. DEUTSCHE BANK NATIONAL TRUST COMPANY, AS TRUSTEE et al
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Wednesday, January 26, 2011, line 3, DEFENDANT ONEWEST BANK, FSB, AS THE SUCCESSOR IN TEREST TO, MERS, INC. DEMURRER TO SECOND AMENDED COMPLAINT. DEFENDANTS DEMURRER TO 1ST CAUSE OF ACTION IS OVERRULED. DEFENDANTS DEMURRER TO 2ND CAUSE OF ACTION IS SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND TO SPECIFY CONDUCT OF INDIVIDUAL DEFENDANTS. DEFENDANTS DEMURRER TO 3RD CAUSE OF ACTION IS SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND TO ADDRESS THE ELEMENTS OF FRAUDS AND WHICH DEFENDANT IS RESPONSIBLE. DEFENDANTS DEMURRER TO 4TH CAUSE OF ACTION IS SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND TO SPECIFY WHAT FRAUDULENT MISREPRESENTATIONS WERE MADE BY WHICH DEFENDANT. =(302/LMG)

rulings.Case Title: MORTON L. SILVERS et al VS. WEISS & COMPANY, LLP et al
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Wednesday, January 26, 2011, line 4, DEFENDANT WEISS & COMPANY, LLP'S DEMURRER TO FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT. DEFENDANT'S DEMURRER TO 1ST AND 2ND CAUSES OF ACTION ARE SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND. PLAINTIFF FAILS TO PLEAD SPECIFIC FACTS SHOWING THAT DEFENDANT HAD A DUTY TO HIM OR SPECIFIC ACTS OF NEGLIGENCE. DEFENDANT'S DEMURRER TO THE 3RD CAUSE OF ACTION IS SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND TO PLEAD SPECIFIC FACTS SHOWING WHETHER THE CONTRACT WAS WRITTEN, ORAL OR IMPLIED CONDUCT PER CCP 430.10(G). DEFENDANT'S DEMURRER TO THE 4TH CAUSE OF ACTION IS SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND TO ESTABLISH THAT DEFENDANT HAD A FIDUCIARY DUTY TO PLAINTIFF. DEFENDANT'S DEMURRER TO THE 5TH AND 6TH CAUSES OF ACTION ARE SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND TO SPECIFICALLY SHOW THAT PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT WERE IN A BUSINESS RELATIONSHIP OR THAT MONEY WAS TRANSACTED. DEFENDANT'S DEMURRER TO THE 7TH CAUSE OF ACTION IS SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND TO SPECIFY WHAT TYPE OF UCL VIOLATION OCCURRED. DEFENDANT'S DEMURRER TO THE 8TH CAUSE OF ACTION SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND TO ALLEGE A SPECIFIC ACT OF FINANCIAL ELDER ABUSE. DEFENDANT'S DEMURRER TO 9TH CAUSE OF ACTION SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND TO SPECIFICALLY IDENTIFY A CONSPIRACY. =(302/LMG)
